filter.showAllNoticeBody: Sono visibili schede provider inattive, vuote, solo configurate e storiche. Solo attivi è la vista normale.

layout.grabbed: Moving {name}. Use arrow keys to move, Enter or Space to drop, Escape to cancel.

rangeNotes.h24: Rolling 24-hour total; chart bars are day-grained.
rangeNotes.month: Last 30 calendar days from local logs.

costSummary.title: Cost summary
costSummary.missingSubscriptions: Subscription history or a reliable fixed-cost source is missing for this range.

costs.noData: No cost data for the selected range.

insights.noData: No activity in the selected range.
insights.selectedRangeDetail: {range} shown with the selected range semantics.

models.heading: Models used
models.costUnknown: API-equivalent cost unavailable for these models.

liveMetrics.heading: Live Load
liveMetrics.aiLoadHelp: Estimated from CPU, memory, and token throughput. Not an exact measurement.

errors.load: Could not load live system metrics.

liveMetrics.tokensPerMinuteHelp: Calculated from local Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, and Ollama logs in the local aggregate. Multica Claude/Codex runs are included through those logs; API-only OpenAI/Anthropic billing is excluded to avoid double counting. Gemini agents may be missing when the Gemini CLI does not write token metadata.
liveMetrics.aiCpuHelp: Aggregated CPU share of recognized local AI process groups. Commands and paths are not exposed.
liveMetrics.aiMemoryHelp: Aggregated resident memory of recognized local AI process groups. Shared Electron and browser memory is approximate.
liveMetrics.swapHelp: System swap usage. High swap can slow the Mac even when AI process memory is only part of the total.
liveMetrics.processBreakdownHelp: Safe aggregate view: running AI process groups and load shares without command lines, prompts, or paths.
liveMetrics.processTotal: AI total: {cpu} CPU · {memory} · {memoryShare} RAM · {count} running processes
liveMetrics.processBreakdownUnavailable: Process grouping is not available on this platform/runtime.
liveMetrics.processBreakdownEmpty: No recognized AI process group is currently running for the dashboard.

pricing.heading: Quanto sarebbero costati i tuoi token tramite API
pricing.meta: Catalogo {catalogVersion} · {modelCount} modelli · EUR via BCE {fxDate} · prezzi API {pricingDate} · punteggio interno {scoreDate}

usedModels.heading: Used models in {range}
usedModels.description: Actual logged model usage matched to the local pricing catalog where possible.
usedModels.empty: No model-level token data is available for the selected range.
usedModels.totalPartialNote: Alcune righe visualizzate non hanno un prezzo API affidabile, quindi il totale è parziale.
usedModels.totalUnknownNote: Nessuna riga visualizzata ha un prezzo API affidabile.
usedModels.totalMixedNote: Le righe visualizzate usano più valute; non viene calcolato alcun totale.

subscriptions.heading: Subscription and fixed costs in {range}
subscriptions.description: Mostra costi fissi mensili solo quando rilevati localmente in modo sicuro o salvati come stime fallback. I dati mancanti non sono trattati come costo reale.
subscriptions.empty: No subscription or fixed-cost data is available yet.

messages.noGeminiLogs: Nessun log locale di utilizzo Gemini trovato.
messages.noCopilotSessionMetrics: No local Copilot CLI session metrics found.
messages.claudeStatuslineNoQuotas: Claude is sending data, but not official Pro/Max limit values yet.
messages.claudeStatuslineMissing: Statusline Claude non configurata. Attiva il comando statusline della dashboard per le quote Pro/Max live.
messages.claudeLiveLimitsMissing: Claude live limits are not available from local telemetry yet.
messages.claudeLimitsStale: Claude live limits are out of date. Open Claude Code once to refresh them.
messages.claudeBrowserLoginHint: Log in to Claude.ai in your browser to enable credit tracking.

emptyState.heading: Nessun utilizzo attivo
emptyState.message: Al momento nessun provider ha token registrati o dati sui limiti.

updateDelayHints.default: This provider has not produced a fresh local signal for more than {minutes} minutes. Some sources only update when their CLI or app writes new usage data.
updateDelayHints.codex: Codex limits normally update through the local app-server. If this stays old, the app-server may be unavailable or Codex has not produced fresh live limit data.
updateDelayHints.codexSpark: Codex Spark limits normally update through the local Codex app-server. If this stays old, Spark live limit data may not be exposed yet.
updateDelayHints.claudeCode: This Claude Code card combines statusline, local logs, and Claude.ai billing or usage data. Updates can lag when Claude Code is closed, the statusline has not run, or Claude.ai cookies/API access are unavailable.
updateDelayHints.copilot: GitHub Copilot CLI usage is written after sessions shut down, and live quota probing depends on the local Copilot CLI. The timestamp can lag while a session is still open or the probe is unavailable.
updateDelayHints.gemini: Gemini local usage updates only when local log files contain new usage metadata.
updateDelayHints.ollama: Ollama usage updates only when requests pass through the dashboard's local proxy/log file.

fableQuotaAudit.heading: Fonte quota Fable
fableQuotaAudit.available: La quota Fable distinta era leggibile automaticamente ed è mostrata come riga propria.
fableQuotaAudit.unavailable: La statusline Claude, i dati browser/account e i log locali non espongono una quota Fable distinta; non viene mostrata alcuna quota sintetica.

labels.updatedHelp: Why this timestamp may be delayed

limits.fullPremiumRequestsDetail: {requests} premium requests from local session logs

pace.remaining: Al ritmo attuale restera circa il {percent}% al reset.
pace.shortfall: Al ritmo attuale manchera circa il {percent}% al reset.
pace.hitBeforeReset: Al ritmo attuale il limite sara raggiunto circa {duration} prima del reset.
pace.fullNoReset: Limite raggiunto; ora del reset non disponibile.

unavailable.noUsage: Ritmo non disponibile: questa fonte non fornisce una percentuale di uso.
unavailable.noWindow: Ritmo non disponibile: questa fonte non fornisce durata della finestra o ora del reset.
unavailable.notStarted: Ritmo non disponibile: questa finestra di quota non e ancora iniziata.
unavailable.staleReset: Ritmo non disponibile: l ora del reset e obsoleta; aggiorna la fonte.

notifications.title: Limits & warnings
notifications.description: Warnings use real 5-hour and weekly provider windows plus projections; they are separate from monthly subscription/API cost comparisons.
notifications.pacingLabel: Pacing warning at projected provider-window usage (%)
notifications.hardLimitLabel: Hard warning at measured provider-window usage (%)
notifications.testQueued: Test requested. If no real system banner appears, open system notifications, allow LLM Usage Dashboard, restart the app, then run the test again.
notifications.testResult_shown: Reported as shown by an older build
notifications.diagPermission: Browser permission (not a macOS banner guarantee)
notifications.permissionNotGranted: Notification permission was not granted. System notification settings were opened; allow LLM Usage Dashboard, restart the app, then run the test again.
notifications.permissionUnsupported: This app runtime does not expose desktop notification permission.
notifications.testQueuedRendererError: Native macOS notification queued, but the immediate browser notification failed: {error}
notifications.inAppTestBody: This in-app fallback confirms the test ran. It is not a system banner; native banners may require system notification permission, a fresh app restart, and a properly signed build.
notifications.nativeDelivery_ready: Signed app: native banners should be available
notifications.nativeDelivery_ad_hoc: Ad-hoc build: native banners may not appear
notifications.nativeDelivery_gatekeeper_rejected: Gatekeeper rejected: native banners may not appear
notifications.openSettingsQueued: System notification settings opened. Allow notifications for LLM Usage Dashboard, restart the app if you just changed the setting, then run the test again.
notifications.openSettingsError: Could not open system notification settings from this runtime.
notifications.systemGuideDefault: Allow notifications for LLM Usage Dashboard in system settings, restart the app if you just changed the setting, then run the test again.
notifications.systemGuidePermission: This app does not yet have notification permission. System settings were opened; allow notifications for LLM Usage Dashboard there.
notifications.systemGuideUnsupported: This runtime cannot read browser notification permission. Open system notification settings and allow notifications for LLM Usage Dashboard there.
notifications.systemGuideNativeUnverified: Native banners are not reliably confirmed with this build. Check system notifications, allow LLM Usage Dashboard, then test again after restarting the app.
notifications.systemGuideTestFailed: The last native notification attempt reported a failure. Check system notifications, restart the app, then run the test again.
notifications.systemGuideAfterTest: If no real system banner appeared, check system notifications, allow LLM Usage Dashboard, restart the app, then send the test again.
notifications.thresholdsHelp: Pacing uses the current consumption rate; hard warning uses measured consumption in the relevant 5h or weekly provider window.

subscriptions.title: Subscription costs
subscriptions.description: Piani e costi rilevati arrivano da segnali locali sicuri. I dati mancanti non contano come costo reale.
subscriptions.detectedOnly: I valori manuali non sono un normale passaggio di setup. Usa Advanced solo come stima di fallback se manca il rilevamento locale.
subscriptions.advancedDescription: Questi valori sono stime fallback salvate. Schede e viste costi li indicano come stime, non come costi rilevati automaticamente.

sources.title: Data sources & diagnostics
sources.description: Manage connected sources, recheck access, and copy ACL commands for other local users.
sources.candidatesEmpty: No additional source candidates detected right now.
sources.connectSuccess: Source connected. Running a fresh diagnostics pass now.
sources.disableSuccess: Source disabled. Usage totals were refreshed.
sources.copyGrantSuccess: Grant commands copied to the clipboard.
sources.copyRevokeSuccess: Revoke commands copied to the clipboard.
sources.copyError: Could not copy commands to the clipboard.

updates.title: App updates
updates.description: Automatic update checks are always active for supported packaged desktop builds; only preview releases are optional.
updates.enabled: Automatic update checks are always active
updates.noticeMacSigning: macOS automatic updates require a signed app. This unsigned build can run after manual approval, but the updater will stay disabled until Developer ID signing and notarization are configured.
updates.noticeDevelopment: Automatic updates run only from a packaged desktop app, not from the development runtime.
updates.noticeUnsupported: Automatic updates are not supported on this platform/package.
updates.noticeGatekeeper: The app is signed, but Gatekeeper did not fully accept it. If updates behave oddly, reinstall a notarized build.
updates.noticeDownloaded: An update has been downloaded. Restart the app to install it.
updates.noticeError: The last update check failed. Check the error line, network access, and release assets.
updates.alwaysOn: Automatic update checks are always active.

supportDescriptions.full: Host file access, process hints, and permissions are measured on this machine.
supportDescriptions.partial_container: Container discovery can miss host users, services, and homes; mounted logs can still be read.
supportDescriptions.stub: Host source discovery is not available on this platform build; current-user configured logs may still be read.
supportDescriptions.unsupported: Host source discovery is unavailable here; use Settings or a supported host build for source setup.

logs.title: Readable log sources
logs.available: The app can read at least one local usage source.
logs.empty: No readable token log source was found in this scan.

savedSources.title: Saved extra sources
savedSources.available: These are additional sources saved in Settings.
savedSources.empty: Zero saved sources is OK: current-user log history can still appear below.

permissions.title: Permission fixes
permissions.blocked: At least one plausible source exists, but this app cannot read it yet.
permissions.clear: No denied source path was found in this scan.

runtimeHints.title: Process/service hints
runtimeHints.available: A supported tool is visible only as a process or service, not as readable logs.
runtimeHints.empty: No process-only or service-only source hints were found.

connected_live.title: Local data is available
connected_live.body: Readable local sources are available. Saved extra-source counts only track sources you connected manually.

current_user_empty.title: Current-user logs empty
current_user_empty.body: The current desktop user was scanned, but no local usage files with token data were found yet.

candidates_readable_empty.title: Readable candidates found
candidates_readable_empty.body: Known tool folders are readable, but they currently look empty or are not saved as extra sources.

candidates_denied.title: Permission action needed
candidates_denied.body: A plausible source was found, but this app cannot read it with the current account.

runtime_hints_only.title: Tool seen without readable logs
runtime_hints_only.body: A supported tool process or service was detected, but no readable log folder was found for it yet.

no_tools_found.title: No local tools found
no_tools_found.body: No supported local tool folders, related processes, or service hints were detected on this machine.

other_dashboard_found.title: Other dashboard instance found
other_dashboard_found.body: Another local LLM Usage Dashboard instance is running and may already be reading local usage data.

partial_unsupported.title: Discovery is limited here
partial_unsupported.body: This runtime can only do limited source discovery, so some users, services, or homes may stay invisible.

discovery_error.title: Discovery error
discovery_error.body: Source discovery did not finish cleanly.

nextActions.connected_live: No action is needed; local data below can come from default current-user logs even with zero saved extra sources.
nextActions.current_user_empty: No action is needed unless you expected history; start a supported tool or inspect sources in Settings.
nextActions.candidates_readable_empty: Open Settings > Local sources if you want to save one of these readable sources.
nextActions.candidates_denied: Open Settings > Local sources, copy the ACL command for the denied source, run it as an admin, then recheck.
nextActions.runtime_hints_only: Wait for the tool to write usage logs, or configure the readable source in Settings and recheck.
nextActions.no_tools_found: Start a supported local tool or add a source in Settings, then recheck.
nextActions.other_dashboard_found: Use the already running dashboard window or stop it before checking this instance again.
nextActions.partial_unsupported: Run the desktop app on the host OS for fuller discovery; mounted local logs can still be shown below.
nextActions.discovery_error: Recheck access. If it fails again, check the backend error and source settings.

quality.officialStarting: Prezzo di listino ufficiale di partenza

costReasons.catalogMissing: Nessun prezzo affidabile di catalogo o account corrisponde a questo piano rilevato.
costReasons.catalogMissingCodexAppServer: Il server app locale Codex ha esposto il piano, ma non il prezzo mensile; nessun prezzo affidabile di catalogo corrisponde.
costReasons.catalogMissingClaudeStatusline: La statusline Claude ha esposto il piano, ma non il prezzo mensile; i dati browser/account mancano o non espongono un prezzo.
costReasons.catalogMissingClaudeAuth: L auth CLI Claude ha esposto il piano, ma non il prezzo mensile; i dati browser/account mancano o non espongono un prezzo.
costReasons.catalogMissingClaudeBrowser: {source} e stata controllata, ma non espone un prezzo mensile del piano.

costActions.addFallback: Aggiorna la fonte catalogo/account o aggiungi una stima di riserva in Advanced.

subscriptions.catalogFallbackNote: Il prezzo mensile è un fallback del catalogo; le fonti app/account in sola lettura forniscono piano, limiti o crediti, ma non un prezzo mensile affidabile.

sourceAudit.heading: Fonti prezzo in sola lettura
sourceAudit.planOnlyNoPrice: solo piano/limiti; nessun prezzo mensile esposto
sourceAudit.browserNoPrice: controllato; nessun prezzo mensile affidabile esposto
sourceAudit.notAvailable: nessuna fonte prezzo sicura in sola lettura disponibile

subscriptions.officialListPriceNote: Prezzo di listino ufficiale; la fatturazione reale può variare per IVA/tasse, sconti annuali, posti, coupon, prezzi regionali o contratti Enterprise.
subscriptions.officialStartingListPriceNote: Prezzo di listino ufficiale di partenza; la fattura reale dell’account non è stata letta e può differire per tier, IVA/imposte, sconti annuali, posti, coupon, prezzi regionali, componenti aggiuntivi o contratti enterprise.
